notes: Public skills are procedural guidance, not architecture authority.
Optional skills remain disabled unless a role or phase explicitly activates them.

guardrails: Prefer diagnosis over trial-and-error patching.
active.name: systematic-debugging
active.summary: Root-cause debugging workflow for model and training failures.
trigger_conditions: Activate on tensor, math, runtime, convergence, or checkpoint failures.

guardrails: Prefer preserving ROCm compatibility over silently switching frameworks.
active.name: rocm-training-debugger
active.summary: ROCm-first troubleshooting for runtime, dtype, memory, and kernel issues.
trigger_conditions: Use when device, HIP, compile, memory, or dtype failures occur.

guardrails: Prefer diagnosis over trial-and-error patching.
always_on.name: systematic-debugging
always_on.summary: Root-cause debugging workflow for model and training failures.
trigger_conditions: Activate on tensor, math, runtime, convergence, or checkpoint failures.

guardrails: Prefer preserving ROCm compatibility over silently switching frameworks.
always_on.name: rocm-training-debugger
always_on.summary: ROCm-first troubleshooting for runtime, dtype, memory, and kernel issues.
trigger_conditions: Use when device, HIP, compile, memory, or dtype failures occur.

guardrails: Require tiny-batch overfit or equivalent sanity evidence before passing smoke.
smoke.name: smoke-test-math-and-shapes
smoke.summary: Validate forward math, tensor shapes, gradients, and tiny-batch sanity.
trigger_conditions: Use whenever smoke tests fail or a new architecture is introduced.

review_requirements: Produce root-cause notes before changing architecture or runtime settings.

guardrails: Do not advance without explicit rationale grounded in evidence.
active.name: phase-gate-rationale
active.summary: Turn logs and metrics into continue, pivot, or stop judgments.
trigger_conditions: Use after every phase to produce a written next-action decision.

guardrails: Do not advance without explicit rationale grounded in evidence.
always_on.name: phase-gate-rationale
always_on.summary: Turn logs and metrics into continue, pivot, or stop judgments.
trigger_conditions: Use after every phase to produce a written next-action decision.

guardrails: Default to general-purpose LM evaluation unless the idea explicitly narrows scope.
optional.name: eval-suite-builder
optional.summary: Assemble metrics, tasks, regression checks, and qualitative prompts for LM evaluation.
trigger_conditions: Enable when an idea requires a specialized evaluation suite beyond defaults.

guardrails: Do not let generic benchmark heuristics erase the need for novelty.
full.name: llm-evaluation
full.summary: Evaluation strategies, automated metrics, and judge-style analysis for LLM systems.
trigger_conditions: Use for comparative analysis, qualitative review, and written judgments.

guardrails: Comparisons must not pressure the agent into architectural imitation.
full.name: baseline-comparator
full.summary: Compare against internal baselines, prior runs, and public references without copying them.
trigger_conditions: Use when deciding whether an idea is promising relative to known references.

guardrails: Do not let generic benchmark heuristics erase the need for novelty.
small.name: llm-evaluation
small.summary: Evaluation strategies, automated metrics, and judge-style analysis for LLM systems.
trigger_conditions: Use for comparative analysis, qualitative review, and written judgments.

guardrails: Comparisons must not pressure the agent into architectural imitation.
small.name: baseline-comparator
small.summary: Compare against internal baselines, prior runs, and public references without copying them.
trigger_conditions: Use when deciding whether an idea is promising relative to known references.

review_requirements: Every phase judgment must include an explicit next action.

guardrails: Use as coding guidance only; do not copy baseline architectures.
active.name: deep-learning-python
active.summary: General PyTorch training, optimization, and modeling hygiene.
trigger_conditions: Activate for model authoring, optimizer setup, and training loop implementation.

guardrails: Reject generic transformer drift even if reference skills are available.
active.name: architecture-originality-gate
active.summary: Reject generic transformer drift and near-copy architectures before implementation or advancement.
trigger_conditions: Activate before coding, before retries, and before advancing phases.

guardrails: Use as coding guidance only; do not copy baseline architectures.
always_on.name: deep-learning-python
always_on.summary: General PyTorch training, optimization, and modeling hygiene.
trigger_conditions: Activate for model authoring, optimizer setup, and training loop implementation.

guardrails: Reject generic transformer drift even if reference skills are available.
always_on.name: architecture-originality-gate
always_on.summary: Reject generic transformer drift and near-copy architectures before implementation or advancement.
trigger_conditions: Activate before coding, before retries, and before advancing phases.

guardrails: Must not be used to scaffold a baseline-style architecture.
Forbidden for reviewer-led originality decisions.
optional.name: transformers
optional.summary: Reference-only conventions for tokenizer/model APIs and interoperability.
trigger_conditions: Use only for API conventions or tokenizer compatibility questions.

review_requirements: Any use of transformers must stay at API-convention level.
Architecture originality review must pass before coding changes proceed.

guardrails: Do not auto-install any discovered skill during autonomous experiments.
active.name: find-skills
active.summary: Discover future skill gaps and catalog candidates from the public directory.
trigger_conditions: Use when the planner needs to identify missing skills or future capability gaps.

guardrails: Do not let orchestration advice override originality requirements.
active.name: ml-pipeline-orchestrator
active.summary: Patterns for structured experiment flow and reproducible ML pipelines.
trigger_conditions: Use when translating an idea into a tracked sequence of phases and retries.

guardrails: Convert inspirations into constraints and recombination options, not copy recipes.
active.name: architecture-research-synthesizer
active.summary: Distill inspirations into design constraints, opportunities, and anti-copy notes.
trigger_conditions: Use when the planner studies external ideas and needs original synthesis.

guardrails: Do not auto-install any discovered skill during autonomous experiments.
always_on.name: find-skills
always_on.summary: Discover future skill gaps and catalog candidates from the public directory.
trigger_conditions: Use when the planner needs to identify missing skills or future capability gaps.

guardrails: Do not let orchestration advice override originality requirements.
always_on.name: ml-pipeline-orchestrator
always_on.summary: Patterns for structured experiment flow and reproducible ML pipelines.
trigger_conditions: Use when translating an idea into a tracked sequence of phases and retries.

guardrails: Convert inspirations into constraints and recombination options, not copy recipes.
always_on.name: architecture-research-synthesizer
always_on.summary: Distill inspirations into design constraints, opportunities, and anti-copy notes.
trigger_conditions: Use when the planner studies external ideas and needs original synthesis.

guardrails: Never activate during routine training runs.
optional.name: skill-creator
optional.summary: Meta-skill for authoring and refining internal skills.
trigger_conditions: Use only when creating or revising project-specific skills.

guardrails: Keep leakage checks explicit across phases.
optional.name: dataset-curriculum-designer
optional.summary: Design smoke, small, and production data curricula with token budgets and leakage checks.
trigger_conditions: Enable when a new dataset curriculum must be designed or revised.

guardrails: Keep leakage checks explicit across phases.
full.name: dataset-curriculum-designer
full.summary: Design smoke, small, and production data curricula with token budgets and leakage checks.
trigger_conditions: Enable when a new dataset curriculum must be designed or revised.

guardrails: Keep leakage checks explicit across phases.
small.name: dataset-curriculum-designer
small.summary: Design smoke, small, and production data curricula with token budgets and leakage checks.
trigger_conditions: Enable when a new dataset curriculum must be designed or revised.

review_requirements: Document anti-copy notes when public inspirations are used.
Record which missing skills were identified versus actually approved.

guardrails: Reject generic transformer drift even if reference skills are available.
active.name: architecture-originality-gate
active.summary: Reject generic transformer drift and near-copy architectures before implementation or advancement.
trigger_conditions: Activate before coding, before retries, and before advancing phases.

guardrails: Block advancement if provenance or artifacts are missing.
active.name: experiment-ledger-auditor
active.summary: Ensure retries, budgets, artifacts, and lineage are persisted before new attempts.
trigger_conditions: Use before retries and before issuing final reports.

guardrails: Reject generic transformer drift even if reference skills are available.
always_on.name: architecture-originality-gate

trigger_conditions: Use for comparative analysis, qualitative review, and written judgments.

guardrails: Do not let generic benchmark heuristics erase the need for novelty.
small.name: llm-evaluation
small.summary: Evaluation strategies, automated metrics, and judge-style analysis for LLM systems.
trigger_conditions: Use for comparative analysis, qualitative review, and written judgments.

guardrails: Use as coding guidance only; do not copy baseline architectures.
active.name: deep-learning-python
active.summary: General PyTorch training, optimization, and modeling hygiene.
trigger_conditions: Activate for model authoring, optimizer setup, and training loop implementation.

guardrails: Use as coding guidance only; do not copy baseline architectures.
always_on.name: deep-learning-python
always_on.summary: General PyTorch training, optimization, and modeling hygiene.
trigger_conditions: Activate for model authoring, optimizer setup, and training loop implementation.

guardrails: Off by default.
Must not be required for local-only runs.
optional.name: weights-and-biases
optional.summary: Optional experiment tracking workflow for teams that choose W&B.
trigger_conditions: Enable only when external experiment tracking is explicitly configured.

guardrails: Keep leakage checks explicit across phases.
optional.name: dataset-curriculum-designer
optional.summary: Design smoke, small, and production data curricula with token budgets and leakage checks.
trigger_conditions: Enable when a new dataset curriculum must be designed or revised.

guardrails: Disabled by default because the framework uses custom training loops.
optional.name: pytorch-lightning
trigger_conditions: Use only if the project intentionally adopts Lightning.

guardrails: Budgets are soft, but every run must record requested and consumed resources.
full.name: scaling-budget-planner
full.summary: Estimate parameter, optimizer, checkpoint, and token budgets under single-node ROCm constraints.
trigger_conditions: Use before expensive runs and before retries that change scale.

guardrails: Do not overwrite lineage when resuming or retrying.
full.name: checkpoint-resume-ops
full.summary: Standardize save policy, crash recovery, resume flow, and report continuity.
trigger_conditions: Use whenever training can span multiple runs or retries.

guardrails: Budgets are soft, but every run must record requested and consumed resources.
small.name: scaling-budget-planner
small.summary: Estimate parameter, optimizer, checkpoint, and token budgets under single-node ROCm constraints.
trigger_conditions: Use before expensive runs and before retries that change scale.

guardrails: Do not overwrite lineage when resuming or retrying.
small.name: checkpoint-resume-ops
small.summary: Standardize save policy, crash recovery, resume flow, and report continuity.
trigger_conditions: Use whenever training can span multiple runs or retries.

review_requirements: External tracking remains off unless explicitly configured.
Record requested and consumed resources for every attempt.
